findings.title: workloadLabels unset (k8s)
findings.detail: kuma.io/workload falls back to the pod ServiceAccount; fine only if ServiceAccounts are distinct per workload.

findings.title: Sampled dataplane inspection coverage
findings.detail: Inspection sampled all dataplanes for per-proxy checks.

manualChecks.title: Old inspect APIs removed (switch to the new inspect API)
manualChecks.detail: Kuma 3.0 removes the legacy dataplane rules-inspection endpoint (`_rules`) and keeps only the redesigned, KRI-based inspect API. Update any tooling that still calls the old endpoint.
manualChecks.command: kubectl get --raw '/meshes/default/dataplanes/web-01/_rules'  # should 404 on 3.0 — migrate callers to the KRI inspect API

manualChecks.title: Rebuild custom policy plugins against the 3.0 SDK
manualChecks.detail: Any in-house policy plugins must be recompiled against the 3.0 plugin SDK; the policy ABI changed.

manualChecks.title: Migrate Helm values renamed or removed in 3.0
manualChecks.detail: Several control-plane Helm values are renamed or dropped. Diff your release against the 3.0 chart before upgrading.
manualChecks.command:
helm get values kong-mesh -n kong-mesh-system -o yaml > values.bak.yaml
helm diff upgrade kong-mesh kong-mesh/kong-mesh \
  -f values.bak.yaml --version 3.0.0

manualChecks.title: Snapshot the control-plane datastore before upgrading
manualChecks.detail: Back up Postgres (Universal) or the Kubernetes resources so the migration is reversible.

manualChecks.title: kuma.io/mesh annotation becomes a label
manualChecks.detail: On 3.0 the mesh association moves from an annotation to a label on the Pod/namespace. Re-label workloads before upgrading.

manualChecks.title: Split Pod-level vs container-level sidecar resources
manualChecks.detail: Sidecar resource requests move from Pod annotations to the container spec. Review overrides before upgrading.
